title: Tender Croatian Rigatoni Pasta
description: A fresh and light Croatian dish featuring rigatoni pasta, served with a sweet glaze and wrapped in a corn husk.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the rigatoni pasta according to the package instructions.
Drain the pasta and set it aside to cool.
In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, garlic, honey, apple cider vinegar, salt, and black pepper to make the glaze.
Brush the glaze over the cooled pasta and toss to coat.
Soak the corn husks in water for 30 minutes to make them pliable.
Wrap each portion of pasta in a corn husk, making sure to seal the edges.
Serve the pasta immediately, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
